title: [Interview] 4-bit Carry-Lookahead Adder
prompt: Design a 4-bit carry-lookahead adder using generate (G=a&b) and propagate (P=a^b) terms. Compute all carries in parallel.
constraints: No ripple carry; carries must be combinational from G/P.
expected_output: sum[3:0] and cout match a+b+cin for all inputs.

title: [Interview] Synchronous FIFO (depth 8)
prompt: Implement a synchronous FIFO with full/empty flags, width 8, depth 8.
constraints: Single clock; no overflow/underflow; use a read and write pointer with a count.
expected_output: Data read out in the same order written; full at 8 entries, empty at 0.
solution_code:
module fifo8(input clk, rst_n, wr, rd, input [7:0] din, output reg [7:0] dout, output full, empty);
  reg [7:0] mem [0:7]; reg [3:0] cnt; reg [2:0] wp, rp;
  assign full = (cnt==8); assign empty=(cnt==0);
  always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
    if(!rst_n) begin cnt<=0; wp<=0; rp<=0; end
    else begin
      if(wr&&!full) begin mem[wp]<=din; wp<=wp+1; end
      if(rd&&!empty) begin dout<=mem[rp]; rp<=rp+1; end
      case({wr&&!full, rd&&!empty})
        2'b10: cnt<=cnt+1; 2'b01: cnt<=cnt-1; default: cnt<=cnt; endcase
    end
  end
endmodule

title: [Interview] Sequence Detector 1011 (overlapping)
prompt: Design a Moore/Mealy FSM that asserts 'found' when the serial input produces the pattern 1011 (overlapping allowed).
constraints: One bit per clock; overlapping matches counted.
expected_output: found=1 the cycle the pattern completes.

title: [Interview] Compute Max Frequency
prompt: Given Tcq=0.2ns, Tlogic=1.5ns, Tsetup=0.1ns, Tskew=0.05ns, write a function/expression for the minimum clock period and Fmax.
constraints: Use the setup equation Tclk+Tskew >= Tcq+Tlogic+Tsetup.

title: [Interview] Parameterized Priority Encoder
prompt: Write a parameterized WIDTH-bit priority encoder returning the index of the highest set bit and a valid flag.
constraints: Use always_comb; handle the all-zero case with valid=0.
expected_output: idx = position of MSB that is 1; valid=|in.

title: [Interview] Constrained-Random Packet Class
prompt: Write a SystemVerilog class for a packet with rand length (1..64) and a payload array; add a constraint that even lengths are twice as likely as odd.
constraints: Use rand, constraint blocks and dist.
expected_output: randomize() produces legal packets with the required distribution.

title: [Interview] UVM Driver run_phase Skeleton
prompt: Write the run_phase of a UVM driver that pulls items from the sequencer and drives them, using get_next_item/item_done.
constraints: Use seq_item_port; honor the handshake with item_done.
expected_output: Driver continuously fetches and drives transactions.

test_cases.name: loop
test_cases.expected: all N driven and item_done called

title: [Interview] Request-Grant Property
prompt: Write a concurrent assertion: every req must be followed by gnt within 1 to 4 cycles, disabled during reset.
constraints: Use disable iff and a delay range.
expected_output: Assertion fails if gnt does not arrive within the window.

title: [Interview] AXI-Lite Write Handshake FSM
prompt: Design the slave-side write FSM for AXI4-Lite: accept AW and W, then issue B (OKAY).
constraints: Use VALID/READY on AW, W, B; single transfers only.
expected_output: After AW and W are accepted, BVALID asserts with BRESP=OKAY until BREADY.
